name: Web3Auth
description: Plug-and-play wallet SDK using MPC and social logins for passwordless onboarding across EVM, Solana and other chains.

seo.title: Web3Auth — Identity / Auth / User Management
seo.meta_description: Web3Auth: Plug-and-play wallet SDK using MPC and social logins for passwordless onboarding across EVM, Solana and other chains.

when_to_use: MPC-based passwordless onboarding for Web3 applications
Social login (Google, Twitter) with embedded wallet creation
OIDC-compatible auth for dApps with backend API access
Multi-chain wallet support for EVM, Solana, and TON
White-label wallet SDK for crypto fintech product integration

pros: MPC-based social login across many chains
Plug-and-play SDKs for web, mobile and Unity
Supports EVM, Solana and non-EVM ecosystems
Good free tier for early projects
cons: Key share model adds architectural complexity
Recovery UX still not as smooth as Web2 accounts
Some pricing tiers require enterprise sales
History of product rebrands creates doc drift
review.verdict: Mature choice for social-login wallets across many chains; review key share model carefully before shipping.
review.best_for: Multi-chain dApps wanting social login with MPC wallets
review.not_for: Apps that need institutional custody or full self-custody
